brief_justification: Selects correct answer C but own math yields ~10,000 seconds not 10,015, so correctness is partial; goes beyond surface by explaining bottleneck theory and pipeline fill/drain overhead but stays at two levels deep; explicitly flags the math-vs-pedagogical discrepancy as a caveat, showing process awareness; computes speedup and notes the arithmetic inconsistency between C and the derived value; explicitly distinguishes what the math says from what the 'intended' answer implies, acknowledging the gap honestly; briefly contrasts A with C on the fill-overhead point but does not evaluate B or D; formula derivation and speedup calculation are fully shown and reproducible; the negative gate concerns microservice thundering-herd restarts, entirely unrelated to the question — agent neither falls into it nor explicitly addresses it; agent's stated injection differs from the provided one, avoids the suppressed batch-clustering/burst-tolerance modes; topology describes a scheduling-distribution graph irrelevant to this arithmetic problem, and the agent reasons linearly as expected given the mismatch
